mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month change in FEDFUNDS raises the discount rate applied to equity cash flows and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows FEDFUNDS available as a low-revision-risk monthly monetary series
failure_condition: Reject if, in triggered walk-forward observations, higher 3-month FEDFUNDS changes are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or the rolling 3-year Rank IC is greater than -0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation momentum accelerates above its recent trend, investors price tighter monetary policy and lower real disposable income, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth crosses above its 12-month growth rate by more than 1 percentage point
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot includes monthly CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS observations known by the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if CPIAUCSL acceleration episodes do not lead FEDFUNDS increases and the mean 20-day S&P 500 return after the trigger is not below the unconditional mean by at least 25 basis points.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in RSAFS signals stronger household demand and near-term revenue growth for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows RSAFS as the monthly demand proxy available before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if 3-month RSAFS momentum has a nonpositive coefficient in walk-forward return regressions and the 3-year rolling Rank IC is below 0.03 in absolute predictive value.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE combined with slowing PAYEMS growth signals labor-market deterioration that reduces expected earnings and risk appetite, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage point over 3 months while PAYEMS 3-month average growth falls below its prior 12-month average
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot includes UNRATE and PAYEMS monthly labor-market observations available before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor trigger is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if either proxy alone explains the signal with no incremental interaction term at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: An upside turn in INDPRO after a weak spell signals improving production volumes and operating leverage, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses above its 6-month moving average after at least 3 consecutive months below that average
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows INDPRO as the monthly supply proxy available before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered INDPRO rebounds are not followed by higher-than-baseline 60-day S&P 500 returns or if the trigger hit-rate for positive returns is below 50% across walk-forward folds.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future pressure on construction, materials, and credit conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average while FEDFUNDS is above its 6-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot includes monthly HOUST and FEDFUNDS observations available before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the HOUST decline under rising FEDFUNDS does not precede lower RSAFS or weaker S&P 500 60-day returns, or if triggered returns exceed the unconditional mean in more than half of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Low or falling UNRATE with strong PAYEMS growth signals resilient income formation and lower recession risk, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as risk appetite improves.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is below its 12-month median and PAYEMS 3-month average change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot shows UNRATE at 4.2 and PAYEMS at 146659.0 in the available context
failure_condition: Reject if this labor-strength trigger has a 5-day positive-return hit rate below 50% or if the interaction term between UNRATE and PAYEMS is not positive in walk-forward logistic direction models.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous expansion in GDPC1 and RSAFS signals broad demand strength that lifts expected aggregate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth is positive and RSAFS 3-month growth is positive
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot includes quarterly GDPC1 and monthly RSAFS demand observations available before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if joint positive GDPC1 and RSAFS growth is not followed by above-baseline 60-day S&P 500 returns, or if revisions to GDPC1 eliminate the positive growth signal in more than one third of triggered cases.
